artifacts.title: Velazandu receipt from 2025-09-01
artifacts.excerpt: @nilsxor if you want to do it in 3d, just do something like this. have the numbers wrap around the surface. same radius on both, constant spacing between numbers if (size between centers of circles for the larger one) = 2*pi*diameter + 5*(size between centers of circles for the smaller) https://t.co/li7h4UHVee

artifacts.title: Model receipt from 2025-04-11
artifacts.excerpt: @willccbb They said 4.5 would be their last non-reasoning model. Do you think they will back track and launch 4.1 without reasoning, or is quasar just the base model that they won't really release?

artifacts.title: Model receipt from 2024-09-06
artifacts.excerpt: @mattshumer_ Less mistakes just for the sake of fixing them later. "1+1=" or "1*1=" should not have the model make a mistake way more often than the base model.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: model, reasoning, could, time.

artifacts.title: Model receipt from 2025-12-18
artifacts.excerpt: @amix3k look at the definition that this benchmark gives for hallucinations. it has nothing to do with being able to trust it. if a model is wrong 1 time out of a billion but it tries to answer every time, that benchmark considers the model as having a 100 percent hallucination rate.
